rationale: The citing paper’s stated constructs and studies focus on ad divergence vs. relevance, product newness (RNP/INP), and self-referencing mechanisms, with no mention of brand personality gender dimensions or related scale use. The cited paper is primarily a scale-development/validation study of masculine vs. feminine brand personality and spokesperson-congruence effects, which appears topically peripheral here. With only a bare DOI match in the references and no contextual evidence of substantive use, this looks like an incidental background citation.
